data.title: U.S. launches new import probes on PPE, medical goods, and robotics
data.description:
The U. S. Department of Commerce launched on Wednesday a new national security investigations into a sweeping range of imports, targeting everything from face masks to factory robots, according to a press briefing from the agency that said the probes were officially opened on September 2. The new cases cover personal protective equipment (PPE), medical instruments, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-launches-new-import-probes/

data.title: TEA pre-sale launched on Coinlist, opening a new participation channel for Chinese users and contributing to the open source incentive ecosystem in the AI ​​era.
data.description: The tea (TEA) protocol presale has officially launched on Coinlist and is open to Chinese users. The subscription period begins at 1:00 AM (Beijing Time) on September 26, 2025. A maximum of 4 billion TEA (4% of the total supply) will be available for presale, with 100% unlocked at the TGE. The project is committed to building a global open-source incentive economy and leveraging AI technology to reshape the application development and security landscape. The project is co-led by Max Howell, founder of Homebrew (whose development tools are used by over 100 million developers worldwide), and Timothy Lewis, founder of Ikigai. TEA has demonstrated impressive performance during its testnet phase: the Assam testnet generated 385 million wallet addresses, and the Sepolia testnet subsequently attracted 177,000 KYC-verified wallets and 11 million total wallet addresses, reaching an estimated 1 million real users. The platform has innovatively introduced a commercial open source licensing mechanism to address the "value extraction crisis"—the situation in which large cloud service providers profit from open source projects without providing any return to the community. Through the dynamic rating system, teaRank, developers will be incentivized based on project impact. Tamper-proof verification and GPG signature technology will also ensure secure application distribution. After the mainnet launch, TEA tokens will be used to directly reward developers and offer multiple incentives, including staking, donations, and node participation. Node operators will receive a proportional share of transaction fees based on their contribution to software distribution. "AI is accelerating application creation at a pace unmatched by traditional app store security mechanisms. tea ensures that the open source ecosystem becomes a transparent, incentivized, and secure infrastructure for the new era," emphasized Tim Lewis, tea co-founder and pkgx CEO. The token distribution plan is: 28% for incentives/airdrops, 21.8% for ecosystem development and governance, and 18.6% for protocol development.

data.title: Ether supply on exchanges hits 9-year low amid ‘Wall Street glow up’

data.title: Tether's Growth Potential Deemed Limitless by CEO
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino recently stated that Tether is currently at a level of 0.25 on a scale of 0 to 100. Ardoino emphasized that the growth potential for Tether is limitless, with ample opportunities for innovation and disruption. He described Tether as a 'once-in-a-century company,' highlighting its potential for future development and impact.

data.title: Binance to Launch Convert Quest Promotion with 50,000 USDC Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to introduce a Convert Quest promotion aimed at rewarding its community in the CIS, CEE, and Balkans regions. The promotion, which runs from 2025-09-25 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-10-24 23:59 (UTC), offers eligible users the chance to share 50,000 USDC in token vouchers. Participants must complete specific Convert tasks to qualify for the rewards.

**Promotion Details**

The promotion consists of three main activities. Promotion A requires users to complete trades on the next day's top-performing token to share a daily pool of 1,000 USDC in token vouchers. Participants must confirm their participation and trade at least 15 USDC equivalent of any token to the top-performing token of the next day. Promotion B involves completing more trades on top-performing tokens to share 15,000 USDC in token vouchers. Eligible participants from Promotion A will be ranked based on the number of days they successfully trade the top-performing token. The top 30 users will qualify for an equal share of the rewards. Promotion C is for new-to-convert users who complete their first trade with Binance Convert, allowing them to share 5,000 USDC in token vouchers.

**Participation Requirements**

To participate, users must confirm their involvement by clicking "Join Activity" on the promotion page and complete the relevant trades during the promotion period. Only trades using Binance Convert's Instant mode will be considered valid. Limit and recurring orders, API trades, stablecoin-to-stablecoin trades, and trades involving old tokens that have undergone swaps or redenominations are excluded. Binance reserves the right to disqualify any participants who engage in prohibited activities such as wash trading or market manipulation. The promotion is restricted to users in eligible regions, and all decisions by Binance regarding the promotion are final.

data.title: GriffinAI founder: GAIN was abnormally issued and sold off in large quantities due to LayerZero forged contract attack
data.description: GriffinAI founder @Griffin_AI disclosed in a post that GAIN (on the BNB chain) experienced an unusual surge in issuance and subsequent massive sell-off several hours ago, causing a sharp price drop. An investigation revealed that the attacker launched the attack by introducing an unauthorized LayerZero forgery node. They deployed a fake Ethereum contract (token TTTTT, address 0x7a8caf) and added it as a LayerZero node for GAIN on Ethereum, bypassing the official contract (0xccdbb9). The attacker then issued an additional 5 billion GAIN on the BNB chain and subsequently sold them. The attacker's wallet currently holds the excess tokens.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 1,000 USDT with a 1.91% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 25, 2025, 03:26 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 1,000 USDT and is now trading at 999.210022 USDT, with a narrowed 1.91% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Plasma (XPL) will soon be listed on the Bybit spot platform
data.description: According to the official announcement, Bybit will list Plasma (XPL) on the spot market at 1 PM UTC on September 25th. Deposits will be available at 3:00 AM UTC on September 25th, trading will begin at 1:00 PM UTC on September 25th, and withdrawals will be available at 10:00 AM UTC on September 26th. Plasma is a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain purpose-built for global stablecoin payments. Stablecoins have become a major use case in the crypto industry, with a current supply exceeding $250 billion and trillions of dollars in monthly trading volume. Plasma is specifically designed to meet this demand, supporting zero-fee USD₮ transfers, custom gas tokens, confidential payments, and the high throughput required to support global scalability.

data.title: Star: The future of on-chain finance will be built on the X Layer
data.description: OKX CEO Star retweeted the news that AAVE will soon be deployed on the X Layer and posted on the X platform, "DeFi lending on the X Layer is experiencing a new upgrade. With the official addition of AAVE, we are unlocking more real-world use cases, institutional-grade security, and massive liquidity. The future of on-chain finance is being built here. As for the FUD surrounding the X Layer and OKB, it won't stop us—every step forward only makes us stronger and more resilient."

data.title: Binance Alpha Removes GAIN’s 4x Trading Volume Bonus
data.description: Binance Alpha announced that due to the large TVL and price volatility of the GriffinAI (GAIN) token, it has cancelled its 4x Alpha trading volume bonus at 8:00 (UTC+8) on September 25.

data.title: Hong Kong Monetary Authority to Release Fixed Income and Currency Roadmap
data.description: According to PANews, the Chief Executive of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, Eddie Yue, announced at the Hong Kong Fixed Income and Currency Forum that a roadmap for fixed income and currency will be released today. Yue emphasized that the future focus will be on enhancing market quality, resilience, and connectivity, whether through new tools like tokenized bonds, cross-platform and cross-regional integration, or meeting the growing demand for green and socially responsible investments. He also highlighted the importance of deepening liquidity and providing more effective risk management tools to ensure the robustness of the ecosystem in the face of global challenges.

data.title: Huang Licheng, the "Big Brother" of the company, suffered a floating loss of $18.68 million on his long position in Hyperliquid.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ember (@EmberCN), Machi Big Brother Huang Licheng (@machibigbrother) has a combined floating loss of approximately $18.68 million on his ETH and PUMP long positions on Hyperliquid. He established a 30,000 ETH long position (valued at $122 million) at $4,399, which currently has a floating loss of $9.92 million, with a liquidation price of $3,694. He also established a 4.85 billion PUMP long position (valued at $26.7 million) at $0.0073, which currently has a floating loss of $8.76 million, with a liquidation price of $0.003.

data.title: The two whales recently accumulated 118 million ASTER tokens, worth $271 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, two whales recently accumulated a total of 118.25 million ASTER tokens (worth approximately $271 million), representing 7.13% of the circulating supply. Fifteen wallets suspected to belong to the same entity withdrew 68.25 million ASTER tokens (worth approximately $156 million) from Aster four days ago. Furthermore, a wallet associated with Daniel Larimer (@bytemaster7) and Galaxy Digital, 0xFB3B, withdrew 50 million ASTER tokens (worth approximately $115 million) from Gate over the past two days.

data.title: Plume Selected for Mastercard's Start Path Program
data.description: Recently, Mastercard officially announced the selection of Plume, one of only five companies worldwide, to join its Start Path program. Competition for the Start Path program is fierce, open only to teams with established products and revenue generation capabilities. Plume's selection not only signifies the recognition of its products and business model by the international payment giant, but also guarantees exclusive support from Mastercard's ecosystem. Recent data indicates that over 50% of global RWA holders have already invested in the Plume network. With over 200 RWAfi projects and numerous institutional partnerships, Plume is rapidly establishing its leading position in the on-chain capital market.

data.title: Australia Plans Fines Up To 10% Of Turnover For Crypto Rule Breaches
data.description:
Australia’s draft law would fine crypto platforms up to 10% of annual turnover or A$16. 5m for breaching new licensing and conduct rules.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/australia-plans-10-pct-turnover-fine-crypto-rule-breaches/

data.title: WLTH officially launches tokenized investment channel, opening up opportunities for Asian investors to participate in Kraken's $17.7 billion valuation.
data.description: Common Wealth (WLTH) has launched tKRAK, a tokenized investment opportunity, providing Asian institutional and retail investors with access to Kraken, a top US cryptocurrency exchange with a reference valuation of $17.7 billion. This tokenized economic interest, tradable on the WLTH market, brings previously inaccessible, premium investment opportunities to the masses. Founded in 2011, Kraken is one of the world's oldest and most trusted cryptocurrency exchanges, serving over 190 countries, with over 10 million users and projected revenue of $1.5 billion by 2024. tKRAK is now open to the public in Asia, with a minimum investment of just $20 and a maximum individual investment of $59,000. The WLTH investment platform leverages tokenization technology to provide investors with transparent token tracking, real-time updates, and a simple participation process. Investors will receive fragmented ERC-721 tokens representing their economic interests, with potential exit options including dividends, strategic acquisitions, an IPO, or subsequent rounds of financing. "We're committed to lowering the barrier to entry for high-quality projects," said Timothy McCann, co-founder and CEO of WLTH Investment Platform. "Kraken's rapid growth and regulatory compliance advantages position it for a leading position in this new industry cycle. We're honored to bring these scarce investment opportunities to the masses." tKRAK subscriptions are now available on the WLTH platform, and secondary market trading is available through the $WLTH Marketplace. Seize this opportunity to become an early investor in one of the world's top crypto unicorns.

data.title: Binance Alpha Removes GAIN’s 4x Trading Volume Bonus
data.description: Binance announced on X that due to significant fluctuations in the TVL and price of the GriffinAI (GAIN) token, to protect user rights, Binance Alpha has canceled its 4x Alpha trading volume bonus as of September 25 at 00:00 (UTC).
